title: notifyproxy: fix container watcher
body:
The notify proxy has a watcher to check whether the container has left the running state.  In that case, Podman should stop waiting for the ready message to prevent a dead lock.  Fix this watcher but adding a loop.

Fixes the dead lock in #16076 surfacing in a timeout.  The underlying issue persists though.  Also use a timer in the select statement to prevent the goroutine from running unnecessarily long

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@redhat.com>

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note

string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
Fix a deadlock in the sdnotify proxy of `kube play`.
```

@edsantiago PTAL.  This does not fix #16076 but hopefully brings us one step closer to solve it.
